_comment: Example A2A target registry for the handoff MCP transport (a2a_transport.py). Provide it via the A2A_TARGETS env var (as a JSON string) or as a2a-targets.json in FUZE_STATE_DIR. Each key is a target agent identity a caller names in spawn_agent/ask_agent/reach_human. All fields are optional: with no entry, a2a_transport falls back to convention (discovery at http://a2a-<slug>.<A2A_DISCOVERY_DOMAIN>:<port>, skill_id = key, tenant = key). The card discovered at the well-known path is the source of truth for the RPC url + binding; these only steer discovery + skill selection.
